ValidationRule.description: It is not allowed to change BU to a single value, if record belongs to multiple BU's
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(BusinessUnit__c), "MarketplaceAdSales") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(BusinessUnit__c), "MarketplaceRetail") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(BusinessUnit__c), "All") || ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(BusinessUnit__c), "RetailAdSales") ) && ( ISPICKVAL(BusinessUnit__c, "Marketplace") || ISPICKVAL(BusinessUnit__c, "Retail") || ISPICKVAL(BusinessUnit__c, "AdSales") ) && $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Record business unit can not be changed back to a single BU value
